JUDGE CHRISTINE VAN AKEN NOW ENTERS THE FOLLOWING RULING: DENIED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF IS ORDERED TO PAY $500.00 IN SANCTIONS WITHIN 30 DAYS.
